name: spectral-skills
description: Agent-oriented spectral data skills for leakage-safe spectral reading, QC, splitting, preprocessing, feature extraction, modeling, optimization, reporting, and workflow routing. This repository root is a GitHub import entrypoint that delegates Codex components to the built plugins/spectral-skills plugin image.

interface.longDescription: Spectral Skills packages nine coordinated Codex skills for spectral data reading, QC, splitting, preprocessing, feature extraction, modeling, optimization, reporting, and workflow routing. The bundle keeps shared runtime code and schemas inside one plugin image so the skills install and update together.
defaultPrompt: Read spectral data into a standard package.
